meaning: n.(财产的)估价员,(收入金额的)审核员,估税员,辅佐人
examples: The mainly influential factors to the construct validity of assessment center are dimension, exercise, assessor, assessee and rating method.
Use the business rules to select the assessor to perform the assessment.
Mr. Ting was campaigning for mayor while holding the office of Assessor and Recorder.
And Tim McGee, Lucas County assessor and one of my precinct captains, I thank him for coming.
